{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320155609178D90905EBB6DFCF688"}"},"total":2338},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7178802962821645091","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看[爱慕]这本书挺不错的。没有女主[害羞]，不像其他这种类型的小说开后宫，跟徒弟搞暧昧。好看，不过作者大大更新的有点慢，求更[送心][送心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1671445372,"group_id":"7138935060513688576","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8HzfcdODvL6VZ/v9+xBTBKuo3wr51J6wot4Qnq6RKC4","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3426518612056599","user_name":"喜欢蜻蛉目的小婉"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3426518612056599","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7138935060513688576","book_info":{"abstract":"【师尊】+【收徒】+【无敌】+【无女主】+【无暧昧】+【幕后流】+【多主角】+【杀伐果断】+【百无禁忌】+【世界观庞大】
江尘带着无上气运系统穿越到玄幻世界，成为紫霄圣地清虚峰峰主。收徒诸多气运之子，获得无量逆天奖励，横推诸天，独断万古。
混沌剑体（女）：我师父曾逆乱时空，一剑断万古，封禁万古仙庭！（已写完）
荒古圣体（男）：我师父曾孤身闯异域，连斩百位不朽，杀的异域无人敢称尊！（已写完）
虚空神体（男）：我师父曾一日平掉九大生命禁区，终结禁区动乱！（已写完）
吞天魔体（女）：我师父曾举世皆敌，战遍三千大世界，覆灭道统无数，打的万界失音！（已写完）
幽冥道体（女）：我师父曾闯地府，断冥河，破九幽，重塑六道轮回！（已写完）
神魔葬体（男）：我师父曾穿越天地玄黄，凝练宇宙洪荒，抹平天地动荡！（已写完）
……
本书的其他书名：《玄幻：收徒气运之子，横推万古》、《让你收徒，没让你杀穿万古！》、《玄幻：我师父无敌且百无禁忌》","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/4131c8e151030a067bef7c83d0fcd8c4","author":"三寸文渊","author_id":"","book_id":"7138935060513688576","book_name":"让你收徒，没让你杀穿万古！","book_short_name":"吾师万古无敌","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8e0d0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":830,"name":"升级流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=830&name=升级流&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7138990 }]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1706967607,"group_id":"7138935060513688576","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"道的尽头是源","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4EA5Z6zEcP9etD55xZEGbSSzX43fXSYiAED+/VVRb9z","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/62fd795c7c6043ec8a4c8811ad9e7566~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776534283&x-signature=I58AKnfcvUOnNVFetDOJciBG62M%3D","user_id":"1095591657999912","user_name":"神话·鸿蒙道源之主"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1095591657999912","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7138935060513688576","book_info":{"abstract":"【师尊】+【收徒】+【无敌】+【无女主】+【无暧昧】+【幕后流】+【多主角】+【杀伐果断】+【百无禁忌】+【世界观庞大】

270158209575","read_count":"16251","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1214643"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"566","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,诸天万界,无敌,无女主,架空,东方玄幻,魂穿,升级流,无后宫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/a263f1a88766345b5b03a31b0b565c5a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779177369&x-signature=%2FD82tueIxY6xTOkZ%2F7zD3pzqFAU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1292623477475735","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"81"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320155609178D90905EBB6DFCF688"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":15,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":15616,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":12582},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1707011511,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7189985116398781217","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看哇，之前随手加进来的，被评分劝退好几次，今天没书看了翻得，超级出乎意料[送心][送心]，这种类型第一次看。
我也看了很多评论，第一，不是有女弟子就是后宫，第二，作者说了很清楚，多主角，花大篇幅描写弟子，弟子也是主角哇[害羞]，第三，有人觉得境界问题，可是天才本来就可以跨阶战哇，两阶算什么[思考]。而且前面一两张就有大幅度劝退的人，看到女弟子就开始了，没有看完就不要乱带节奏[怒][怒]。
我看到现在也没有无脑情节，而且很爽，完全没有影响到虐敌人，作者安排很好，希望作者大大坚持下去[飞吻][飞吻][飞吻]。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1674048981,"group_id":"7138935060513688576","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3UMV+SZ7iGfbqYz6IVBP+g=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/912ae7d7941942358ce3ad71a6fa1bdb~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776532878&x-signature=uHslzl%2BSMLVxiQdJ%2FANYZ66nG9o%3D","user_id":"175515384680531","user_name":"阿楠～胖胖"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"175515384680531","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7138935060513688576","book_info":{"abstract":"【师尊】+【收徒】+【无敌】+【无女主】+【无暧昧】+【幕后流】+【多主角】+【杀伐果断】+【百无禁忌】+【世界观庞大】
